raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a sequence",
    "b must be a sequence"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "returns a new sequence containing all elements from a and b",
    "the type of the returned sequence is the same as the type of a"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "a is an empty sequence",
    "b is an empty sequence",
    "a and b are of different sequence types",
    "a or b contains non-hashable elements"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.groq2:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a sequence",
    "b must be a sequence",
    "all items in a must be plain strings",
    "all items in b must be plain strings"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "a is a sequence of plain strings",
    "a contains all items from the original sequence plus the items from b"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "if a is not a sequence, raises TypeError",
    "if b is not a sequence, raises TypeError",
    "if a is None, raises TypeError",
    "if b is None, raises TypeError"
  ]
}
```
